sections.paragraph:
Original: לכישׁ

Transliteration: lâkı̂ysh

Phonetic: law-keesh'

BDB Definition:

Lachish = "invincible"
  1. a city lying south of Jerusalem on the borders of Simeon and which belonged to the Amorites until conquered by Joshua and allotted to Judah

Origin: from an unused root of uncertain meaning

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
